headlines.title: Shein Is Said to Move Ahead With Preparations for Hong Kong IPO
headlines.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shein Group Ltd. is moving ahead with preparatory work for a possible Hong Kong initial public offering, people familiar with the matter said, potentially capping a yearslong effort by the fast-fashion giant to go public.

headlines.title: PDD Holdings (PDD) Stock May Be Undervalued Despite A 26% Slide
headlines.summary: PDD Holdings stock has fallen 25.8% year to date, yet the valuation checks still lean cheap, which sets up a clear tension between weak recent returns and what the current price suggests about value. Year to date, the share price has declined 25.8%, which means investors are coming to this valuation debate after a material pullback rather than a hot streak.

headlines.title: Citi’s Endorsement And Cash Focus Might Change The Case For Investing In PDD Holdings (PDD)
headlines.summary: In early July 2026, Citi named PDD Holdings one of its top picks among Chinese internet companies, pointing to what it sees as attractive valuations and resilient cash generation across the sector. Citi also underscored PDD’s sizeable cash and equivalents of about US$63.00 billion and growing AI capabilities as key supports for its long-term business strength.

headlines.title: PDD Holdings (PDD) On Citi Backing And A Narrative That Still Looks Undervalued
headlines.summary: PDD Holdings (PDD) is back in focus after Citi included the stock among its top picks, pointing to strong cash generation and sizeable liquidity even as Chinese internet valuations sit near multi year lows. See our latest analysis for PDD Holdings. Those Citi comments come after a mixed stretch for PDD Holdings, with the stock gaining 2.7% on a 1-day basis but sitting well below earlier highs. This is reflected in a 90-day share price return that declined 15.

headlines.title: Citi Sees Buying Opportunity in PDD
headlines.summary: PDD Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:PDD) is one of the 12 Most Profitable Cheap Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 27, Citi said that China’s major internet companies have become unpopular with investors this year as money has shifted toward AI chipmakers.

description: PDD Holdings Inc., a multinational commerce group that owns and operates a portfolio of businesses. The company operates Pinduoduo platform, which provides various product categories and interactive shopping experiences; and Temu, an online platform, which enables merchants to streamline their manufacturing and commercial operations. The company was formerly known as Pinduoduo Inc. and changed its name to PDD Holdings Inc. in February 2023. PDD Holdings Inc. was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Dublin, Ireland.
